text_preview:
Military Internal Correspondence

Santa Cruz, May 28, 1986

From : 1st Ten Av Kleber Caldas Marinho

To : Commander of the Lo Gp Av Ca

Subject: Report of the fact occurred on 05/19/86 (Monday)

The first eye contact occurred after THOR commanded 180°. The objective was in the position of one to two hours low, at this moment, by order of LINCE I approved the objective and started an attempt of approach in the bow 240°. At a certain moment, as my search had only been visual until then, I turned on my on-board radar and got a contact at 12 o’clock (which matched the visual) at a distance ranging
summary: Santa Cruz pilot Jambock 17 report (May 19, 1986) describes chasing a color-pulsing object from FL170 to FL330 with radar confirmation and anomalous HSI/DME instrument readings.
